title: PARENT EDUCATION - 211info
text: NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES PARENT EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting education with various classes taught throughout the year, including Parenting Inside Out and Strengthening Families. Strengthening Families is taught in both English and Spanish 6200 SE King Road Portland, OR 97222 Eligibility: Parents and caretakers of children. Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Class days and times vary Email (503) 546-6377 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 546-6377 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-4pm Services: Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WOMEN'S HEALTH PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - CASA ESPERANZA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING INSIDE OUT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH ALCOHOL AND DRUG OUTPATIENT TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
